summary: No-ship: the root-cause seam matches the approved plan and no test weakening was found, but the branch violates the locked single-flip scope.

findings.title: Out-of-scope domain contract change breaks the single-flip lock
findings.body: The branch adds project-wide glossary contracts for Vanished, Absent, and Entry/Seen, but bugfix-lock.json limits non-test changes to src/store/**, docs/adr/**, and scripts/f14-witness-gate.sh. CONTEXT.md is neither an allowed path nor exempt slug-local bookkeeping. Under the review's non-negotiable scope rule, this undeclared change surface is a Blocker regardless of whether the prose is accurate.
findings.recommendation: Remove this glossary change from B-1 and land it separately, or formally revise the plan and lock to include CONTEXT.md before rerunning the gate.

next_steps: Restore the locked scope, then rerun the structure review against the revised diff.
